album.title: you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love [Explicit]

wiki.summary: “honeybee” is the third track from Olivia Rodrigo’s third studio album, you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love. The track was first teased on July 15, 2025, where Olivia wore an encore shirt in Milan with a bee on it. Then, on April 17, 2026, she revealed in her TikTok comment section: "oooh which track am i the most excited about yall hearing… hmmm theres a song about an insect hahah" Read more on Last.fm.
